title: hoya verticillata var. hendersonii
intro: Hoya verticillata var. hendersonii is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is a variety of the Hoya verticillata, a type of flowering succulent native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hoya verticillata var. hendersonii include reducing fever, alleviating skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety in modern medicine.
